title: Adam Hlozek recovers to make Czechia squad | FIFA World Cup 2026
original_text:
Miroslav Koubek has also named 17-year-old Sparta Prague midfielder Hugo Sochurek in his World Cup roster.
Miroslav Koubek has named his squad for the FIFA World Cup 2026™, where Czechia will take on Korea Republic, co-hosts Mexico and South Africa in Group A.
Having initially picked a 29-player provisional roster, Koubek has whittled his selection down to 26. Attacking midfielder Adam Hlozek, who has missed most of the Bundesliga season for Hoffenheim, has sufficiently recovered from calf and foot injuries and looks set for an important role. He scored in a 2-1 friendly win over Kosovo on 31 May.

— Česká fotbalová reprezentace (@ceskarepre_cz) May 21, 2026
Seventeen-year-old Sparta Prague midfielder Hugo Sochurek is included, but Pavel Bucha, Christophe Kabongo and Tomas Ladra have been cut from Koubek's provisional selection.
Lyon midfielder Pavel Sulc, Bayer Leverkusen striker Patrik Schick and West Ham midfield Tomas Soucek will provide valuable experience to the Czech squad, who will be taking part in the global finals for the first time since Germany 2006. Captain Ladislav Krejci, meanwhile, will provide quality and leadership.
Slavia Prague players David Doudera and Tomas Chory will be without valuable match practice after being given lengthy bans following red cards in the recent abandoned Prague derby.
Czechia's provisional World Cup squadCzechia's provisional World Cup squad
GoalkeepersGoalkeepers
Lukas Hornicek Matej Kovar Jindrich Stanrk
DefendersDefenders
Vladimir Coufal David Doudera Tomas Holes Robin Hranac Stepan Chaloupek David Jurasek Ladislav Krejci Jaroslav Zeleny David Zima
MidfieldersMidfielders
Lukas Cerv Vladimir Darida Lukas Provod Michal Sadilek Hugo Sochurek Alexandr Sojka Tomas Soucek Pavel Sulc Denis Visinsky
ForwardsForwards
Adam Hlozek Tomas Chory Mojmir Chytil Jan Kuchta Patrik Schick
All squads are provisional until the final list of 26 players is announced by FIFA, following their submission by participating teams, on 2 June.
Czechia's World Cup 2026 fixtures and groupCzechia's World Cup 2026 fixtures and group
11 June: Korea Republic v Czechia - Estadio Guadalajara
18 June: Czechia v South Africa - Atlanta Stadium
24 June: Czechia v Mexico - Mexico City Stadium
